note: 7-lane parallel session completed. Key friction points: (1) task subagent_type permissions blocked lane-owner type — had to use plan + execution types as fallback per allowlist. (2) Typecheck script issue: `bun run typecheck` fails via smart_bun command type but works with `bun run typecheck` via run command. (3) Lane 1 Foundation pre-validated that binder getBinders() fix and RuntimeEvent columns were already present from prior sessions — wasted effort that should have been caught in preflight. (4) 115 pre-existing type errors remain across 10 files from all 7 lanes — Integration repair fixed 4 cross-lane conflicts but could not fix the underlying per-lane type issues within the repair scope. (5) campaign/index.ts was touched by 3 lanes concurrently (L1, L5, L7) but all changes were additive/append-only — no actual conflict because each lane appended their section rather than rewriting.
